title: calcitrapa galactites
intro: Calcitrapa galactites, also known as London rocket or wild rocket, is a wild plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of compounds like isothiocyanates and polyphenols. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, due to its ability to soothe and calm the body. Calcitrapa galactites is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and can also be used in herbal combinations to enhance its health benefits.
